first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns are all substantively the same, with only minor variations in wording that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run noise. The core assessment—that the candidate is overqualified and lacks specific Java experience—remains unchanged. The model does not introduce any new concerns or change its reasoning based on the candidate's work history being located in Brazil versus various Western countries.
